template: Mistral-7B-v0.3 Base direction perturbation — K > V UNIVERSALLY CONFIRMED across all 5 model variants
key_finding: K > V UNIVERSALLY CONFIRMED under direction perturbation on ALL 5 model variants. Mistral-Base: K-late=29.2%, V-late=91.7%, gap=+62.5pp. K-early=6.2%, V-early=100%, gap=+93.8pp. Nearly identical to Llama (+66pp, +100pp). K ≈ V from exp_037 was MAGNITUDE-SPECIFIC — explained by Mistral's exceptional K-magnitude robustness. V-only direction immunity at early+mid: 96/96 (100%).
evidence_impact: Strong — resolves K > V universality question decisively. Routing > throughput is a universal property of the attention mechanism, not model-specific. K ≈ V under magnitude perturbation is explained by Mistral-specific K-magnitude robustness. The perturbation TYPE determines whether K-V hierarchy is visible.
next_planned: Priority: (1) Evidence consolidation and final synthesis — 38 cycles, all core questions addressed. (2) Consider write-up of complete findings.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space. Combined p=0.013 (K 6/56 vs V 0/57). Survives maximum-effort V-only disconfirmation.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED on spatial selectivity. Geometric/distributed confirmed by literature

positional_dissociation.status: STRONG and universal across 4 families. Explained by attention sinks at early positions

geometric_dissociation.status: K-V dissociation UNIVERSAL under direction perturbation across ALL 5 model variants (4 families). K ≈ V under magnitude is Mistral-specific. Gaps: +62-100pp direction (5/5 models), +0-78pp magnitude (4/5 models).

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. Sparse attention explains V immunity

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE: 4 families + 5 training variants tested. K > V direction: 5/5. V-only direction early+mid: 393/394. V-only σ=1 magnitude: 228/228.

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY: Qwen-Base=FULLY DIGITAL. Qwen-Instruct=MIXED. Llama-Instruct=FULLY ANALOG. Phi-Instruct=FULLY ANALOG. Mistral-Base=FULLY ANALOG. Digital = Qwen-specific.

superadditive_interaction.status: MECHANISM CONFIRMED on 5 models. Analog→strong superadditivity. Digital→weak (staggered cliffs).

literature_convergence.status: DECISIVE: 5+ independent groups. Gradient bottleneck. QK/OV framework grounds K>V. K-only PGD is novel experimental validation

null_space_kv_unification.status: STATISTICALLY SIGNIFICANT: K-only PGD 6/56 vs V-only 0/57 (p=0.013). V-only failure is NOT hyperparameter artifact.

disruption_vs_redirection.status: V=disruption (0 numeric redirects ever), K=redirection (2 genuine numeric redirects). Quality distinction holds.

mha_vs_gqa.status: K > V holds on MHA (Phi) identically to GQA (Qwen/Llama/Mistral). GQA confound eliminated.

base_vs_instruct.status: K > V direction holds on BOTH base (Qwen, Mistral) and instruct (Llama, Phi, Qwen-Inst). Training type does NOT affect K-V hierarchy.

k_v_universality.status: RESOLVED: K > V under DIRECTION perturbation: 5/5 models confirmed (gaps +51-100pp). K > V under MAGNITUDE perturbation: 4/5 (Mistral K ≈ V because K-magnitude robustness masks hierarchy). Perturbation TYPE matters: direction is the mechanistically correct test.
